themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Then said they, We will restore them, and will require nothing of them; so will we do as thou...".
